title: Software
text:
I develop open-source software in R related to robust statistics and semiparametric regression models.

rplam-vs: An R package for robust estimation and simultaneous variable selection in partially linear additive models.
rmargint: An R package with the classical and robust marginal integration procedures for estimating the additive components in an additive model.

title: Resources
text:
My research focuses on robust statistics, semiparametric models, variable selection, and statistical learning.




Boente, Graciela, and Alejandra Martínez. 2016. “Estimating Additive Models with Missing Responses.” Communications in Statistics: Theory and Methods 15: 413–29.


———. 2017. “Marginal Integration \(M-\)Estimators for Additive Models.” Test 26: 231–60.


———. 2023. “A Robust Spline Approach in Partially Linear Additive Models.” Computational Statistics and Data Analysis 178: 107611. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.csda.2022.107611.


———. 2024. “Robust Variable Selection for Partially Linear Additive Models.” Statistics and Computing 34: 201. https://doi.org/10.1007/s11222-024-10520-7.


Boente, Graciela, Alejandra Martínez, and Matias Salibian-Barrera. 2017. “Robust Estimators for Additive Models Using Backfitting.” Journal of Nonparametric Statistics 29: 744–67.


Martínez, Alejandra Mercedes. 2025. “A Robust Estimation and Variable Selection Approach for Sparse Partially Linear Additive Models.” https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.13126.


Martínez, Alejandra, and Matias Salibian-Barrera. 2021. “RBF: An  R Package to Compute a Robust Backfitting Estimator for Additive Models.” Journal of Open Source Software 6: 2992. https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.02992.

title: Teaching
text: I teach undergraduate and graduate courses in probability, statistics, and mathematics at the National University of Luján.

title: Research
text: My research interests include robust estimation, semiparametric regression models and variable selection.

title: Alejandra Martínez
text:
Alejandra Martínez
Assistant Professor Department of Basic Sciences National University of Luján
Researcher at CONICET
Argentina

My research focuses on robust statistics, semiparametric models, variable selection, and statistical learning.
Welcome to my academic website. Here you will find information about my research, teaching, software, and freely available educational resources.
